author: Xheldon
description: Synchronize files in your Vault with a specified directory in the designated GitHub repository (rather than the entire repository); send your images to cloud storage services. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Xheldon
manifest.description: Synchronize files in your Vault with a specified directory in the designated GitHub repository (rather than the entire repository); send your images to cloud storage services.

name: Git Folder Sync

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## [1.0.5] - 2024-12-19

### Fixed
- Fixed hardcoded `.obsidian` paths to use `app.vault.configDir` for better compatibility
- Moved inline JavaScript styles to CSS files for better theme adaptability
- Reduced console.log pollution by implementing debug-only logging
- Improved type safety by removing `any` type casting where possible
- Fixed GitHub settings not saving to data.json
- Fixed debugLog recursive call issue causing test button to be unresponsive

### Added
- Enhanced test URL button to validate both URL format and GitHub token
- Comprehensive GitHub connection testing with user info and permissions
- Loading states and detailed feedback for better user experience

### Changed
- Enhanced code quality to meet Obsidian community plugin standards
- Better CSS class management for status indicators and UI elements

releases.author: Xheldon
releases.description:
# Git Folder Sync v1.0.1 - Plugin Rebranding

## 🔄 Changes in this version

### Plugin Identity Update
- **New Plugin ID**: `git-folder-sync` (was `git-sync`)
- **Consistent Naming**: Now called "Git Folder Sync" everywhere
- **Better Clarity**: The name now clearly indicates folder-specific sync capability

### What's Updated
- ✅ Plugin manifest and package information
- ✅ All user interface text and translations
- ✅ Documentation (README files)
- ✅ Internal cache keys and identifiers

### For Existing Users
- This is a cosmetic update - all functionality remains the same
- Settings and data will be preserved
- No action required from users

## 🚀 Features (unchanged)

### 🔄 Git Synchronization
- **Bidirectional sync** with GitHub repositories  
- **Folder-specific sync** (not entire repository)
- **Smart caching** to reduce API calls
- **Real-time status** display

### 🖼️ Image Processing  
- **Automatic upload** to cloud storage on paste
- **Multiple providers**: Aliyun OSS, Tencent COS, AWS S3, Cloudflare R2
- **Local storage option** for offline use
- **Configurable paths** and templates

### 🌍 User Experience
- **Bilingual support**: Chinese and English
- **Mobile compatible**: Works on iOS and Android  
- **Modern interface**: Responsive design with real-time feedback

## 📖 Documentation
- [English README](https://github.com/Xheldon/git-folder-sync/blob/1.0.1/README.md)
- [中文说明](https://github.com/Xheldon/git-folder-sync/blob/1.0.1/README_CN.md)

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Xheldon/git-folder-sync/compare/1.0.0...1.0.1
releases.name: v1.0.1 - Plugin Rebranding
